opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Destroyed couch → showroom sofa for $47 (pet hair gone in 10 min)
opportunities.before_state: Faded, pet-hair-coated sofa with visible stains and worn armrests from years of use
opportunities.after_state: Smooth, fitted neutral-tone cover that makes the couch look brand new — no fur, no stains
opportunities.why_now: April shedding season + spring cleaning push sends pet owners searching for fast furniture fixes at peak annual volume.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 4-piece wicker conversation set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Bare concrete patio → outdoor living room for $289
opportunities.before_state: Empty or mismatched plastic chairs on a bare patio with no cohesion or comfort
opportunities.after_state: Coordinated wicker seating with cushions — guest-ready backyard in one afternoon
opportunities.why_now: Mid-April marks the single highest-traffic week of the year for outdoor furniture searches as homeowners prep for spring entertaining.

opportunities.specific_product: Stackable clear pantry bins with label set (40-piece)
opportunities.transformation_hook: Chaotic pantry → Pinterest pantry for $34 in 45 minutes
opportunities.before_state: Overflowing shelves of loose bags, expired items buried in the back, nothing visible or accessible
opportunities.after_state: Fully categorized, labeled clear bins with clean sightlines and reclaimed shelf space
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning peaks in mid-April and pantry organization is the #1 most-searched home project in this seasonal window.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm adjustable side sleeper pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: 3 years of neck pain → first pain-free morning for $79
opportunities.before_state: Flat, unsupportive pillow leaving neck stiff every morning, shoulder compressed against mattress
opportunities.after_state: Curved ergonomic fill supporting neck alignment — waking up pain-free and fully rested
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness Reels continue to outperform in engagement and saves, and neck-pain testimonial hooks drive unusually high comment-to-click conversion.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia herb stripper and stem separator set
opportunities.transformation_hook: 20 minutes of herb prep → 90 seconds flat with a $22 tool
opportunities.before_state: Messy cutting board, slow manual stripping of rosemary and thyme stems by hand
opportunities.after_state: Effortless herb stripping in seconds with clean results and a tidy prep station
opportunities.why_now: Spring garden harvests and outdoor cooking season create a seasonal spike in kitchen prep tool searches starting mid-April.
